key_highlights: SpaceX Starship test flight mostly successful, with mock satellite deployment, ahead of potential IPO that could make Elon Musk the world's first trillionaire.
Fed officials discussed rate hikes at last meeting due to inflation concerns, and new Fed Chair Kevin Warsh signals a 'regime change' but rate cuts are unlikely.
Consumer sentiment hits all-time low in the US due to high gas prices and cost of living, while Walmart warns of price increases from soaring fuel costs.
S&P 500 posts eighth weekly gain driven by AI stocks, but BofA warns mega-IPOs risk a bubble similar to the Roaring '20s.
Gold falls below $4,500 amid hawkish Fed signals, while Nasdaq gets SEC approval to list Bitcoin index options.
Geopolitical tensions remain high with US-Iran talks in holding pattern, US blockade redirects 100 vessels, and Ebola outbreak spreads in Uganda.
India raises fuel prices for third time in eight days, adding to global inflation pressures.
Jim Cramer highlights buying opportunities in NVIDIA, Equinix, and Xometry, while cautioning on Snap.

sectors.trend: Strong momentum with AI stocks powering the S&P 500 rally. Data center plays like Equinix and Astera Labs are favored. NVIDIA remains a core holding despite high valuations.
sectors.implications: Investors should maintain exposure to AI infrastructure but be selective. Data center REITs and semiconductor companies with DRAM exposure (Micron) are well-positioned.

sectors.trend: SpaceX's successful Starship test and potential IPO are catalysts. Space Capital CEO sees continued growth. Defense spending remains elevated amid geopolitical tensions.
sectors.implications: Space-related stocks and ETFs could see increased interest. Monitor SpaceX IPO for valuation benchmarks.

sectors.trend: Rising gas prices ahead of summer travel, with diesel savings highlighted. India raising fuel prices. Gold falling on hawkish Fed. Southern Copper premium assets noted.
sectors.implications: Energy stocks may benefit from higher prices, but consumer discretionary spending could be squeezed. Gold may face headwinds if Fed remains hawkish.

sectors.trend: K-shaped economy persists: retailers use dual playbooks of price cuts and premiumization. Walmart warns of price increases. Cava CEO highlights differentiation. Amazon remains a core holding.
sectors.implications: Investors should favor companies with pricing power or unique value propositions. Discount retailers and premium brands may both perform well.

sectors.trend: Ebola outbreak in Uganda, US aid plummets 99%. Cerus upgraded post Q1. Biodesix PT raised. Lantheus explores $7B sale.
sectors.implications: Infectious disease plays may see short-term interest. Biotech with strong pipelines or M&A potential are attractive.

sectors.trend: Nasdaq gets SEC approval for Bitcoin index options. Fed hawkishness weighs on crypto. SoFi has solid quarter but softer forecasts. JPMorgan CEO has bad news for bankers.
sectors.implications: Crypto infrastructure is maturing. Financials may face headwinds from rate uncertainty. SoFi is a hold with caution.

key_themes: AI-driven market rally with risk of bubble (BofA warning)
Fed policy uncertainty and inflation concerns
Consumer strain from high fuel and food costs
Space industry commercialization and IPO wave

risk_assessment.mitigation: Reduce duration in bond portfolios, favor value stocks, and maintain cash reserves. Monitor Fed minutes and speeches.
Avoid overexposure to discretionary names without pricing power. Focus on essentials and discount retailers. Watch Walmart guidance.
Diversify geographically. Hold safe-haven assets like gold (though currently under pressure) or Treasuries. Monitor oil prices.
Avoid chasing IPOs at high valuations. Focus on fundamentals. BofA's Hartnett warns of Roaring '20s-style bubble.
Invest in companies with pricing power (e.g., NVIDIA, Equinix). Consider TIPS or commodity exposure. Monitor CPI and PPI data.
Diversify beyond mega-cap tech. Consider equal-weight S&P 500 or sector rotation. Set stop-losses on high-flying AI names.

opportunities.recommendation: Increase exposure to AI infrastructure and data centers
opportunities.rationale: Strong secular growth driven by AI adoption. Equinix and Astera Labs are well-positioned. Jim Cramer and analysts are bullish.

opportunities.recommendation: Buy Bitcoin index options on Nasdaq approval
opportunities.rationale: SEC approval legitimizes crypto derivatives, potentially attracting institutional capital. Bitcoin options offer regulated exposure.

opportunities.recommendation: Invest in space industry via ETFs or SpaceX IPO
opportunities.rationale: SpaceX's successful test flight and potential IPO are catalysts. Space sector is gaining momentum.

opportunities.recommendation: Add to positions in companies with pricing power (NVIDIA, Amazon, Cava)
opportunities.rationale: Inflation-resistant businesses with strong demand. Cava's unique cuisine differentiates it. Amazon's durable growth narrative.

opportunities.recommendation: Consider defensive consumer staples with pricing power
opportunities.rationale: Consumer sentiment at all-time low suggests defensive positioning. Walmart's warning indicates pricing power but also risk.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Reduce exposure to high-growth, unprofitable tech names
defensive_moves.rationale: Fed hawkishness and rising rates compress valuations for speculative stocks. Snap and SoFi face headwinds.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Hedge against inflation with TIPS and commodities
defensive_moves.rationale: Persistent inflation and rising fuel costs support commodity exposure. Gold is under pressure but may rebound if Fed pivots.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Increase cash allocation and reduce leverage
defensive_moves.rationale: Market sentiment is neutral with multiple risks (Fed, geopolitics, consumer). Cash provides optionality for dips.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Diversify internationally to reduce US-centric risk
defensive_moves.rationale: Emerging assets posted positive week on peace deal hopes. India and Bangladesh show growth. Japan-China talks at APEC.

defensive_moves.recommendation: Monitor and potentially short overvalued meme stocks or frothy IPOs
defensive_moves.rationale: BofA warns of bubble risk. Trump's 3,711 trades show multiple strategies but also potential for volatility.

market_outlook.short_term: 1-3 month outlook: Markets are likely to remain volatile with a neutral to slightly negative bias. Fed uncertainty, consumer strain, and geopolitical risks will cap upside. AI stocks may continue to rally but face profit-taking risk. Gold and crypto could see further downside if Fed remains hawkish. Consumer discretionary names may underperform.
market_outlook.long_term: 6-12 month outlook: Positive but with caveats. AI and data center infrastructure remain secular growth stories. Space industry could become a new growth frontier. However, inflation persistence, potential rate hikes, and geopolitical shocks could cause corrections. The K-shaped economy will favor winners with pricing power. Diversification and quality are key.
key_catalysts: Fed meeting minutes and next rate decision (June 2026)
US-Iran nuclear deal progress or collapse
Uganda Ebola outbreak containment or spread
Q2 earnings season (especially NVIDIA, Amazon, Walmart)
CPI and PCE inflation data for May and June
Bitcoin options trading launch on Nasdaq
India monsoon season impact on inflation
US consumer sentiment and retail sales data
watch_list: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh speeches and policy signals
Oil prices (WTI and Brent) and gasoline prices
SpaceX Starship test flight results and IPO timeline
Ebola case counts in Uganda and neighboring countries
NVIDIA and AMD earnings and guidance
US dollar index (DXY) and emerging market currencies
